channel.title: Services on Franklin Peñaranda | coffemanfp
channel.description: Recent content in Services on Franklin Peñaranda | coffemanfp

item.title: Database managment
item.description: I know very well the handling of relational database managers. I am quite familiar with PostgreSQL or SQLite3.

item.title: Back-End Development
item.description: My main field of strength is Back-End development. With technologies like Go, PostgreSQL and Linux, I can feel completely fluent when coding.

item.title: Front-End Development
item.description: Although Front-End is not my specialty, I do not rule out any possibility of working on it.
